name: Two-wheeler insurance — TP only vs comprehensive
description: User buying a new scooter and confused about insurance options

input.message: I just bought a Honda Activa 6G for ₹85,000. The dealer is offering comprehensive insurance for ₹4,500 or just third party for ₹1,200. Which should I get? Is third party enough?

notes: Must explain TP is mandatory by law. Comprehensive = TP + own damage. For new vehicle, comprehensive strongly recommended. TP only covers third party damage/injury, not own scooter. Must mention Motor Vehicles Act requirement.
